title: Tipos de Coleta AgroSUS Schema
description: JSON Schema for Tipos de Coleta AgroSUS ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the Tipos de Coleta AgroSUS ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at https://jefersonrl.github.io/AgroSUS-FHIR/ValueSet-agrosus-tipo-coleta.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
